english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response: First, we listen to the first words that a person says and we try to keep those words in our mind or write them down. Then, we watch the next time that person or another person talks about those words and we look at the new words they use. Then, we put the first words and the new words next to each other and we see if the new words have the very same part, the very same line, and the very same what it says as the first words. Then, we notice if any part of the first words is missing, added, or changed into something that says a different thing. Then, we ask if the new words still say what is real or if they now say something that is not real. Then, we can tell that the person is changing what was really said when the new words do not be the very same as the first words in what they say or line. This means we have found a change in the story and we can point it out.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen

english_query: how two things happening together does not mean one causes the other

First, let us look at an idea. Imagine that every time a man carries a thing to keep him dry from the water in the sky, it starts to rain. This third thing makes both the rain and the man to take his thing to keep him dry. The rain and the thing to keep him dry are together, but one does not make the other happen.

Second, let us look at another way things can be together. Sometimes two things happen together just by chance. If you throw a small round metal thing that has two sides and you see it land on its side, and at that same time a bird flies past your window, you might think they are part of the same thing. To know if one thing makes another thing happen, we cannot just look at them being together. We must find a way to see if changing the first thing will change the second thing. In each case, decide if thing number one is true or not, and also decide if thing number two is true or not. If you can find even one case where thing number two is true and thing number one is not true, then thing number two does not always come after thing number one. In that case, thing number two does not need thing number one.  

Step three is the other check. Ask: is there any case where thing number one is true but thing number two is not true? If you can not find any such case, then every time thing number one is true, thing number two is also true. That means thing number two follows from thing number one.  

So the whole idea is a two part check. First, look for a case where the second thing is true without the first thing being true. If you find one, the join does not hold. Second, look for a case where the first thing is true without the second thing being true. If you can not find any, then the second thing must happen when the first thing happens.  

When you finish these checks, you will know whether thing number two comes after thing number one in the sense that the truth of the first makes the truth of the second. This way works for any two things you want to look at side by side, as long as you can picture the different cases that might be.

english_query: why treating people as things to use is always wrong
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why is it bad to use a person like a thing to get what you want?

Person number two: It is bad because every person has their own life and their own way of thinking. When you act toward them as if they were a thing, you stop seeing them as a living being with their own wants.

Person number one: But if we all use each other to get what we need, does it not make the world work better?

Person number two: It might seem that way at first, but it breaks the trust between people. If you only see others as things to help you, you will never have a real way of being close to them. You are only looking at what they can do for you, not who they are.

Person number one: So, if I only talk to my friend because they have a car, am I acting toward them as if they were a thing?

Person number two: Yes, you are. You are not caring about the person, you are only caring about the car. You are acting toward the person as a way to get the car.

Person number one: What should I do instead to make sure I am being good?

Person number two: You must see that the other person is just as important as you are. You must care about the feeling of being happy in their life as much as your own. You should act in a way that shows you see them as a person, not as a way to get what you want.

english_query: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
ugf_response:
When you know something, you might want to tell everyone. You might think that telling everyone what you know is the best thing to do. However, this is not always true. There are many reasons why you should be careful about how much you tell.

First, you must think about the people who will hear your words. Some people are kind and want to help. Other people may want to use what you know to hurt you or to take things away from you. If you tell a person how you do a job, they might do that same job and take your place. If you tell them how you make money, they might try to take that money for themselves.

Second, you should think about the things you are telling. Some things are very important and need to be kept safe. If you tell a thing that is meant to be kept only between a few people, you break the trust that people have in you. Once you break that trust, it is very hard to get it back. People will not believe you again, even when you are telling the truth.

Third, telling everything you know can make things hard to understand. If you give too much information to too many people, the information can get changed. People might add things that are not true or leave out things that are true. Then, when someone else hears it, they do not know what is real. This can lead to big things going wrong and many problems.

Finally, you must think about your own work. If you spend all your time telling others what you know, you might not have time to learn new things. You need to keep some things for yourself so you can keep growing and getting better.

So, when you want to share what you know, stop and think. Ask yourself who is listening. Ask yourself if the thing you are saying is safe to say. Ask yourself if telling this will help or if it will make things bad. Being careful with what you say is a good way to live.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response: First, we see a person who thinks there are only two ways to go. They think they must choose the first way or the second way. This is a way of thinking that says there is no other way to be. But we must stop and think. We should ask if there are other ways that are not the first way or the second way. Often, there is a third way, or a way after the third, or many more ways. If we only look at two ways, we might not find the best way. We might pick a way that is not good because we did not see the other ways that were there. This means that thinking there are only two ways can make us make a bad choice. We must look past the two ways to see all the things that can be done.

english_query: how to think about what the other person will do before you act
ugf_response:
The person wants to tell us how to think before we do something. They want to know what the other person will do when we do a thing.

First, the part of what they say that is true is that we must think about the other person. This is a thing that is true. We must always think about what others will do. If we do a thing without thinking about them, we might make a bad choice.

Second, the part of what they say that they think follows from this is that if we think about the other person first, we will be able to make a better choice. They think that knowing what the other person might do will help us to get what we want or to avoid a bad thing.

Third, we look at if their thinking is good. To see if the thinking is good, we must see if the first part and the second part fit together in a way that makes sense. If we know what the other person will do, we can change how we do things in a real way. This part of the thinking is good. However, there is a problem. We can never know for sure what a person will do. We can only make a guess. If our guess is wrong, what we do might still be bad. So, the thinking is good in its way, but it is not perfect because we cannot see into the minds of others.

english_query: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
ugf_response: First we think about the feeling that comes when we eat good food or get a new thing to play with. This feeling is nice but it goes away fast. Then we look for the feeling that stays with us for a long time. We see that this deep feeling comes from being close to other people who care for us. It also comes from doing work that feels good and makes us feel like we are doing something good for the world. When we help others or learn new things we feel strong and true. This kind of good feeling does not fade like the good feeling from a sweet thing to eat. It grows when we share it with friends and family. So the deepest good feeling is not just about getting what we want right now. It is about having good ties to other people and feeling like our life has a good reason for being.

english_query: how people make deals when they will see each other again
ugf_response: First, we think about two people who meet to talk about giving and taking. They know they will see each other again soon. This is different from when they meet a stranger and will never see that person again. When they know they will meet again, they care about what the other person thinks of them. If one person tries to take more than is right, the other person may be mad. This mad feeling can make the next time they meet very hard. So, the first person might choose to be kind and give what is right now. This is because being kind now helps them get good things later. The hard question is how to fit what you want right now with what you want in the future. Some people say you should always be nice. They think this builds trust. Trust makes life easier for everyone. Other people say you should watch out for yourself. They think if you are too nice, the other person might use you for their own good. They say you must be ready to stop talking with someone if they are not right. This way, you keep yourself safe. Most people find a way in the middle. They try to be right but also keep an eye on what the other person does. If the other person is good, they stay good. If the other person is bad, they change their plan. This shows that knowing you will see someone again changes how you act. It makes people think about the long run, not just the short run.

english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response:
First idea they say is that when you face a hard question you should first find a part of it that you know is real. They tell you to look for a fact that you can see with your own mind or with a place you trust. This part is taken as the real start point that you can hold on to while you move forward.

Second idea they say comes after that real start point. From the real part they say you should try to see what next part might follow. They ask you to ask yourself if one thing makes another thing seem more true, or if one step makes the next step easier to see. In this way they want you to build a small group of thoughts that goes from the real start point toward a possible answer.

Third idea they say is that you should look at the group you have built and ask if the way you have moved makes sense. They say you should check if each part that joins feels right, if it helps you get closer to a clear answer, and if it does not hurt the other parts you already know. If the group feels right and helps you see a clear answer, then the thinking is good. If it feels off, makes you more confused, or seems to push you away from the real start point, then the thinking is not good and you should go back and try a new way. This three part way is meant to give you a simple road to think about hard questions step by step.

english_query: how some ideas stop you from thinking further
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks. A person has many thoughts in their head. Sometimes, a person finds a thought that feels very strong and very true. This thought acts like a wall. When a person hits this wall, they stop moving forward with their thinking. This happens because the person thinks their thought is the only way things can be. They do not want to look at other ways because those ways might make their strong thought look bad. Second, we see that a person might also hold onto a thought because it makes them feel safe. If a new thought makes them feel afraid or makes them feel like they were wrong before, they will push the new thought away. They stay with the old thought to keep feeling good about what they know. Third, we see that when people stay with these old thoughts, they stop asking new questions. If you do not ask new questions, your mind does not go to new places. You stay in the same spot. This is how a thought can stop you from seeing more of the truth. Finally, we see that to move past this, a person must be willing to let go of what they think is true so they can find what is actually true.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
The first idea is that many people can believe a thing at the same time. This is a thing that happens all the time in our world. The second idea is that the number of people who believe a thing does not change if that thing is true or not true. A thing can be true even if only one person knows it, and a thing can be not true even if every person on earth says it is true.

The third idea is the part that follows from these first two ideas. It says that we should not believe a thing just because we see many other people believing it. If we only believe things because of how many people believe them, we might believe things that are not true. We might be wrong just because we want to be like the others.

To see if this thinking is good, we must look at how the ideas fit together. The first idea and the second idea are both true. They are things we know to be real. The third idea follows from them in a good way. If the number of people does not tell us if a thing is true, then we cannot use that number to decide if we should believe the thing. For this reason, the thinking is good and the point being made is strong.

english_query: how a group can agree on rules that are good for everyone
ugf_response: First, we must see that every person in a group wants things to go well for themselves. Second, we see that what is good for one person might be bad for another person. Third, we must find a way to make everyone feel that the things they must do are right and not wrong. To do this, the people must sit together and talk about what they want. They must tell each other what they need and what they fear. Then, they can look for things that all people want. For one such thing, everyone wants to be safe and everyone wants to have enough to eat. Once they find these things, they can make a set of ways to act that keep these needs for all. These ways must be the same for everyone, so no one gets more than another for no reason. If everyone sees that the ways are the same and that the ways keep everyone safe, they will agree to follow them. Finally, the group must make sure that if someone does not follow the ways, there is a way to fix the bad thing that happened without hurting people more than they need to be hurt.

english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
People often feel more hurt when they lose something than they feel happy when they get that same thing. This is a strange way for our minds to work, but it happens to almost everyone. To understand this, we must look at how we see things we have and things we do not have.

First, imagine you have ten pieces of food to eat. If someone takes away two pieces, you will feel very sad. The feeling of things going away is very strong. Now, imagine you have nothing and someone gives you two pieces. You will feel happy, but that happy feeling is not as strong as the sad feeling you had when the food was taken away. The hurt from things going away is bigger than the happy feeling from things coming.

There are a few reasons why this happens. One reason is that we care more about what we already own. Once something is part of our life, it becomes part of who we are. When it goes away, it feels like a part of us is gone. When we get something new, it is nice, but it does not change who we are as much.

Another reason is how we stay safe. Long ago, when people lived in the wild, losing food or a place to sleep could mean death. Getting extra food was good, but losing the food you already had could be very bad for staying alive. Our minds grew to care more about not losing what we need to stay alive. This way of thinking stayed with us even though we do not live in the wild now.

Because of this, we often make choices that are not the best. We might stay in a bad place or keep a bad thing just because we are afraid of it going away. We let the fear of things going away stop us from trying to get something better. We are more afraid of the hurt of losing than we are excited by the chance to win.

english_query: how paying close attention to what someone needs is a kind of good
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why do you think it is good to look with great care at what a person needs?

Person number two: It is good because when you see what someone really wants or needs, you can act in a way that makes their life better. It is a way to show you care about them.

Person number one: But how does that make the world a better place?

Person number two: When we all do this, we stop acting only for the person we are. We start to see the other people around us. This makes the group of people stronger and more happy.

Person number one: Is it possible to look with too much care? Could it be bad to think only about what they need?

Person number two: Yes, that can happen. If you only think about what they need and forget to think about what you need, you might become too tired or lose your own way.

Person number one: So, it is a way of being good, but we must also be careful.

Person number two: That is right. The good part comes from the act of seeing and helping, but we must keep our own hearts well too.

english_query: the difference between a strong reason and a weak reason
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know why some ways of thinking are better than other ways of thinking when we want to know if something is true.

Person number two: I can tell you about that. When we want to know if a thing is true, we look for why it might be so. Some of these reasons are good and some of these reasons are not good.

Person number one: What makes a reason good?

Person number two: A good reason is one that rests on things we can see and know to be true for everyone. It stays true even if we change how we look at it. It is hard to say it is not true.

Person number one: What about a reason that is not good?

Person number two: A reason that is not good is one that rests on a feeling or a single thing that might not happen again. It is easy to find a way to show it is not true.

Person number one: So, if I say I think it will rain because I feel sad, is that a reason that is not good?

Person number two: Yes, that is a reason that is not good. Your feeling does not make the sky change. But if you say it will rain because the clouds are dark and the air is heavy, that is a good reason. The dark clouds are something we can all see and agree on.

english_query: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
ugf_response:
When we look at a time when a person wants to live a good life by being a good person, we first see a lot of different things together of feeling, thought, and doing. The picture is a person who tries to do what feels right, who tries to help other people, and who tries to keep the inside of his own heart free of hurt. The hard question that comes up in this picture is this: what does it really mean to be a good person in a way that makes the whole life feel good? In other words, what is the right way to live so that the life itself feels full, quiet, and kind?

One group of people say that the right way is to act in ways that bring help to other people. They point to times when a hand is given to someone who is down, when a word is spoken that lifts a sad heart, or when a small thing is done that makes a big need go away. They think that the good of the whole life comes from the whole many of these small acts. The reason they hold this view is that they have seen that when many people share help, the whole group feels safer and more happy, and the person who gives also feels a warm feeling inside.

Another group says that the good of a life comes more from being true to the inside of the person. They talk about feeling at quiet with the person own thoughts, about keeping promises that the person made to the person, and about not doing things that make the own heart feel heavy. For them, a good life is a life where the person does not hurt his own mind, even if that sometimes means not giving as much as others. They give this answer because they have felt that when they do against the person own feeling, they end up with a hurt inside that spreads to the way they meet other people.

A third group looks at the way that many people get along together. They say that a good life is a life that follows the ways that keep the group from fighting, that keep the quiet, and that let each person have enough to eat and sleep. They think that the right way is to follow the ways that have been learned from the ones before, because those ways have kept the group alive for a long time. Their reason is that they have watched what happens when the ways are ignored – a big lot of trouble, fear, and hurt spread quickly.

Each of these answers is tied to a different kind of feeling and a different look at what makes a life feel good. The first answer points to the feeling that comes from giving, the second to the feeling that comes from being true inside, and the third to the feeling that comes from living with others in a safe way. All of them try to tell about a way to live that feels right, and all of them show why a person might pick one over the others. In the end, the question stays open, and each person may have to look inside, look at the people around, and look at the ways that have kept people safe, to find the path that feels most good for their own life.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
We want to know what will happen in the future. To do this, we look at what has happened before. We look at the past to see how things move and change. We think that if something happened many times before, it will happen again in the same way. This is how we try to guess what is coming next.

But there is a big problem with this way of thinking. The problem is that the past does not show us everything. Just because things were one way before does not mean they must stay that way. The world is always changing. New things can come into being that were never there before. These new things can change how everything works.

Imagine you are watching a man walk down a road. You see him walk for ten minutes. You see him go forward in a straight line. You think to yourself that he will keep going in that same straight line. You use what you saw to guess what he will do next. But then, something new happens. A big hole appears in the ground. The man must stop or turn. The hole was not there when you were watching him. Because the hole is new, your guess about his path was wrong.

The past can tell us about things that are already here. It can tell us how things act when things stay the same. But the past cannot tell us about things that have not happened yet. It cannot tell us about a time when the world becomes different. If we only look at what was, we might not be able to see what could be. We might think we know the way, but we are only looking at a road that is no longer there. This makes it very hard to be sure about what will come.
